updates.author: M001
updates.title: Roster Updated for May
updates.body: May roster has been finalized and published. Please review your shifts and flag any conflicts by EOD Thursday. Sneha returns from leave on May 3rd.

updates.author: M004
updates.title: Overnight — All Clear
updates.body: Night shift completed without incidents. All systems green. One minor alert at 03:22 IST — auto-resolved. Escalation log updated.

updates.author: M002
updates.title: New Client Threshold Effective May 1
updates.body: Per the SLA amendment signed last week, Client XYZ's response SLA drops from 4hr to 2hr starting May 1. Update your dashboards accordingly.

updates.author: M001
updates.title: Mandatory Cybersecurity Training — Deadline Apr 30
updates.body: All team members must complete the Q2 Cybersecurity Training on the LMS portal before April 30. Non-completion will be escalated to HR. Link in Important Links tab.

updates.author: M005
updates.title: Tool Update: Jira Board Restructured
updates.body: The Jira board has been reorganized — new columns for 'Blocked' and 'In Review'. Old 'In Progress' tickets migrated. Please update your ticket statuses.

handovers.summary: Night shift clear. One auto-resolved alert at 03:22. No pending escalations. Batch job BJ-402 completed successfully at 04:10. Client XYZ raised a query at 05:45 — awaiting response, ticket INC-8812 created.

openItems.item: INC-8812: Client XYZ query pending response
BJ-403 batch scheduled for 10:00 IST — monitor

handovers.summary: Morning shift completed. SLA compliance at 98.2%. Two tickets closed. Client ABC call at 14:00 — notes in Confluence. Pending: INC-8809 with Dev team, no ETA yet.

openItems.item: INC-8809: Dev team working on fix, follow up by 18:00
Q2 metrics sheet to be updated before EOD

handovers.summary: Afternoon completed. INC-8809 resolved by Dev at 19:30 — closed. All SLAs met. Client XYZ compliance check done — green. No pending items for night.
